name: charter
description: Know the project: gates substantive work on documented quality attributes, maintains a committed Claude-facing roadmap/backlog file (cross-session/engineer coordination), and keeps a project map (file→responsibility index) so a session orients from the map instead of re-scanning the tree — the token lever for an AI maintainer. Generates the docs from the codebase/git history when missing, reconciles them when present. Read-only over the project (the hook detects; the model authors the files).
